meta.title: Lattice Model Node Companion
meta.schema: state / control / transform / invariant / drift / coherence / score
meta.boundary: Local visual research companion. No external model calls, no clinical, remediation, or physics claim by itself.

nodes.label: Mirror Architecture
nodes.description: Unified architecture layer that maps state, control, transform, invariant, drift, coherence, and score across domains.

nodes.label: Nest 1: Formal Systems
nodes.description: Linear algebra, symmetries, invariants, encoded circuit states, and formal score grammar.

nodes.label: Linear Algebra
nodes.description: Vector spaces, bases, transforms, projections, eigensystems, norms, and encoded state representations.

nodes.label: Symmetry + Invariant
nodes.description: Conservation under transformation: the formal source of balance, stable relation, and drift detection.

nodes.label: Encoded Circuit State
nodes.description: AI geometry expressed as circuit-state structure before hardware execution.

nodes.label: Nest 2: Structured Matter
nodes.description: Elements, molecules, materials, minerals, food chemistry, water, and reaction pathways.

nodes.label: Elements
nodes.description: Periodic families, shell structure, valence, electronegativity, oxidation states, and isotope classes.

nodes.label: Hydrogen
nodes.description: Clean bridge from element / isotope structure into fusion and solar systems.

nodes.label: Oxygen / Redox
nodes.description: O2, oxidation state, electron transfer, dissolved oxygen, reactive species, metabolism, fire, and remediation controls.

nodes.label: H2O / Water
nodes.description: Bond angle, polarity, hydrogen bonding, hydration shells, solvent behavior, and biological bridge.

nodes.label: Minerals
nodes.description: Lattice, composition, surfaces, weathering, ion exchange, clays, oxides, and remediation interfaces.

nodes.label: Food Chemistry
nodes.description: Proteins, carbs, fats, vitamins, minerals, fiber, hydration, and food-state transforms before metabolism.

nodes.label: Proteins
nodes.description: Amino-acid sequence, folding, charge, functional motifs, digestion products, and cell-facing signaling inputs.

nodes.label: Carbs + Fats
nodes.description: Sugar polymers, starch, fiber, lipid chains, saturation, membrane precursors, and energy substrate classes.

nodes.label: Vitamins + Nutrients
nodes.description: Micronutrient classes, mineral cofactors, solubility, redox roles, methylation supports, and deficiency / excess drift.

nodes.label: PFAS / Pharma / Microplastics
nodes.description: Persistent contaminant families mapped by bond topology, safe endpoints, and bad-descendant penalties.

nodes.label: Nest 3: Classical Coherence
nodes.description: Oscillators, resonance, EMF, plasma, fire, fusion, spectral comparators, phase-lock, and field dynamics.

nodes.label: Terahertz
nodes.description: Spectral pattern bridge into water, molecules, cells, DNA, and later measured biological response.

nodes.label: Fire + Plasma
nodes.description: Combustion, ionized matter, radicals, fields, surface activation, byproducts, and bounded controls.

nodes.label: Fusion + Solar
nodes.description: Hydrogen isotope state, plasma confinement, reaction channel, solar output, and larger convergence systems.

nodes.label: Nest 4: Biology
nodes.description: HRV, EEG, physiology, cells, genome, proteome, metabolism, timing channels, and living comparator classes.

nodes.label: HRV + EEG
nodes.status: HRV first matrix complete / EEG planned
nodes.description: Human-state timing signals that can later become live biological input into the companion map.

nodes.label: Cells + Genome
nodes.description: DNA, epigenome, transcriptome, proteome, signaling, membranes, mitochondria, repair, and drift modes.

nodes.label: Metabolism
nodes.description: Food chemistry becomes biological state through digestion, absorption, energy flow, cofactors, microbiome, and cellular signaling.

nodes.label: Nest 5: Convergence
nodes.description: Multi-class convergence matrix across formal systems, matter, coherence, biology, ecology, and engineered systems.

nodes.label: Ecosystem / Planet
nodes.description: Soil, ocean, atmosphere, climate, solar-terrestrial coupling, biodiversity, food webs, and recovery dynamics.

nodes.label: NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo
nodes.description: Future physics AI adapter for field systems, PDE-like dynamics, plasma, fluids, resonance, and engineered physics surfaces.

nodes.label: MatterGen / MatGL / CHGNet / MACE
nodes.description: Future materials and atomistic graph adapters for molecules, crystals, material candidates, and property surfaces.

nodes.label: RDKit / ASE / pymatgen / FairChem
nodes.description: Future toolkit bridge for molecules, atomistic structures, crystals, catalysts, and reaction-surface comparators.
